chapter_title.ar: حَدِيثُ نُوحٍ ( عليه السلام ) يَوْمَ الْقِيَامَةِ
chapter_title.en: HADEETH OF NOAH<sup>as</sup> ON THE DAY OF JUDGEMENT

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن أو موثق على الظاهر - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (6 / 316)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن أو موثق على الظاهر - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (6 / 316)
text: سَمِعْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ (عليه السلام) يَقْرَأُ وَ زُلْزِلُوا ثُمَّ زُلْزِلُوا حَتَّى يَقُولَ الرَّسُولُ.

en.hubeali: H 14887 – Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad Bin Isa, from Al-Husayn Bin Sayf, from his brother, from his father, from Abu Bakr Bin Muhammad who said:
I heard Abu Abdullahasws, recite this Verse as:
“[2:214] ‘يَقْرَأُ وَ زُلْزِلُوا ثُمَّ زُلْزِلُوا حَتَّى يَقُولَ الرَّسُولُ’ and they were shaken violently, (then they were shaken violently) so that the Messenger said”.
en.sarwar: 440. Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Ali Bin Asbaat, from Ali Bin Abu Hamza, from Baseer, who has narrated the following: Abu Abdullah (a.s.) said: “[2:102] And they followed what the Shaitans chanted of sorcery (with the Wilayah of the Satans) in the reign of Sulaiman”. And he (a.s.) also recited “[2:211] Ask the Israelites how many a clear sign have We given them; (and among them were ones who believed, and among them were ones who fought against there, and among them were ones who accepted, and among them were ones who altered them) and whoever changes the favour of Allah after it has come to him, then surely Allah is severe in requiting (evil).”
